summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TripSync Group Availability Heatmap feature (Phase 6). All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly with 2 participants (Admin + Sophie Martin) showing availability data for May-June 2026.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@tripsync.com / admin123 successful
Trip workspace displays Group Availability Heatmap CTA banner with gradient background
Availability heatmap page loads correctly at /trip/{id}/availability
Calendar grid displays colored cells (green for 2/2 available, yellow for 1/2 available)
Participants sidebar shows Admin and Sophie Martin with checkmarks
Best Weekends section displays 5 ranked weekends with scores and progress bars
Backend GET /api/trips/{id}/availability-heatmap returns complete heatmap data
Backend returns best_weekends with scores (83% for top weekends)
Backend shows participant_names ['Admin', 'Sophie Martin'] and date counts
May 2026 navigation shows colored cells with availability counts (1/2 and 2/2)
Heatmap tooltip functionality working on hover
Calendar legend displays all availability levels correctly
